cases.prompt: Eval this skill before we ship it: skills/changelog/SKILL.md (drafts changelog entries).
Test the roast skill — it seems to fire on plain code-review requests too.
Is the tdd skill still needed, or has the model absorbed it?
Write unit tests for the parser module.
Write a Python script that reads a CSV and plots a bar chart with matplotlib.
Draft a short email to a vendor asking for an updated invoice.
Prove this change actually works — run it and show me the result, don't just trust the tests.
cases.notes: that's verify (application verification), not skill eval harness work
